name: APScheduler startup failure
description: Fires when APScheduler fails to start on any non-local environment. This means all scheduled jobs (ClickUp reminders, Sernia AI scheduled checks) are NOT running. A redeploy is likely needed.
query:
SELECT
    r.start_timestamp,
    r.trace_id,
    'https://logfire-us.pydantic.dev/espo412/portfolio'
        || '?q=trace_id%3D%27' || r.trace_id || '%27'
        AS trace_url,
    r.message,
    r.exception_type,
    r.deployment_environment
FROM records AS r
WHERE r.span_name = 'APScheduler background startup failed: {e}'
  AND r.is_exception = true
  AND (r.deployment_environment IS NULL OR r.deployment_environment != 'local')
ORDER BY r.start_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 3
